message:
fix(messaging): improve JetStream pull timeout handling

Addresses edge cases in consumer pull operations:

Timeout improvements:
- Add CLIENT_TIMEOUT_SLACK (100ms) to allow server messages to arrive
- Client timeout = server expires + slack, preventing premature cancellation
- Zero duration now properly disables client-side timeout and sets
  JetStream expires=0 (infinite wait)

Type safety:
- Use i64 for expires field instead of u64 (matches JetStream API)
- Clamp nanosecond values to i64::MAX to prevent overflow
- Handle zero duration specially (no clamping needed)

Error handling:
- Properly unsubscribe on publish_request failure before returning error
- Prevents orphaned subscriptions in error paths

These changes ensure pull operations don't time out prematurely while
the server is still processing, and handle edge cases like zero-duration
waits for long-polling patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
